XPMP2
X-Plane multiplayer library 2 - using instancing
Here is a list of all functions with links to the classes they belong to:

- a -

  • accept() : XPMP2::TCPConnection
  • add() : XPMP2::RmtDataAcAnimTy, XPMP2::RmtMsgBufTy< ElemTy, MsgTy, msgVer >
  • add_send() : XPMP2::RmtMsgBufTy< ElemTy, MsgTy, msgVer >
  • AddChn() : XPMP2::SoundSystem
  • AddMatchCriteria() : XPMP2::CSLModel
  • Aircraft() : XPMP2::Aircraft
  • AllChnSetVol() : XPMP2::SoundSystemXP
  • applyDefaults() : XPMP2::Aircraft::wakeTy
  • AssignModel() : XPMP2::Aircraft
